## Purpose
Defines how support requests are handled, prioritized, and escalated.

## Support Tiers

| Tier | Responsibility | Target Response | Target Resolution |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **L1 (General)** | basic UI/UX issues, content updates. | 4 Business Hours | 2 Business Days |
| **L2 (Technical)** | Bug investigation, data issues. | 2 Business Hours | 1 Business Day |
| **L3 (Critical)** | System outage, security breach. | 30 Minutes | As fast as possible |

## Escalation Matrix

1.  **L1 Contact:** [Support Email/Jira Link]
2.  **L2 Escalation:** [Lead Engineer Slack/Phone]
3.  **L3 Escalation:** [Vantus Executive Hotline]

## Client Responsibilities
- Provide clear steps to reproduce issues.
- Grant necessary developer access tokens for investigation.
- Initial triage for end-user (client of client) issues.
